title: Consider the consequences of vaping - Canada.ca
content:
## Consider the consequences of vaping
With described video
Current position: 00:00:00
Total time: 00:00:31

## Transcript - Consider the consequences of vaping
(A group of teens  hang out in a basement.)
(A male teen passes a  vaping device to his friend. It lights up.)
(The friend takes the  vaping device and looks at it sceptically. Another friend also looks  concerned.)
(A yellow and black  “caution” filter appears over the friend’s face.)
(TEXT ON SCREEN:  CONSIDER THE CONSEQUENCES OF VAPING)
(The filter  disappears.)
(A female teen  fidgets with a vaping device in her hand.)
(A black-and-white  filter with yellow stripes appears.)
(TEXT ON SCREEN:  NICOTINE ADDICTION)
(The young female looks  around the room. A vapour cloud shaped like a brain forms over her head.)
(A yellow and black  filter appears.)
(TEXT ON SCREEN:  ALTERS TEEN BRAIN DEVELOPMENT)
(The filter  disappears.)
(A hand fills up a  vaping device.)
(TEXT ON SCREEN:  HARMFUL CHEMICALS)
(The first teen  raises his eyebrows encouragingly at the friend with the vaping device.)
(A black-and-white  filter with yellow stripes appears over the young man’s face. A vapour cloud  shaped like lungs forms over his chest.)
(TEXT ON SCREEN: LUNG  DAMAGE)
(The filter  disappears.)
(The yellow and black  filter appears. The friend holding the vaping device looks at it closely. A vapour  cloud shaped like a question mark appears over the vaping device.)
(TEXT ON SCREEN:  UNKNOWN LONG-TERM HEALTH EFFECTS)
(The filter  disappears.)
(The skeptical friend  shakes his head “no” and passes back the vaping device.)
(The friend takes  back the vaping device.)
(The screen cuts to a  yellow background.)
(TEXT ON SCREEN: IT’S  YOUR LIFE. WHY RISK IT?)
(TEXT ON SCREEN:  Learn more at Canada.ca/vaping-info)
A message from the Government of Canada.
